config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: We can look at an example here (in which we learn about one type's behavior) as follows; let us show how this is accomplished using LINQs : if some variable called "furniture" has been assigned * for all items on display during any given event loop since May 4th 2009 , then there will never occur another unregistered item from now on when those objects no longer exist! Thus you're free not only through elimination or other means possible—if things aren't still running well enough--but also because they don' t really matter anymore whether new furniture exists within your inventory window while holding up something else until after
